Title: Teki ka mikata ka? Nazo no kyodai uchûsen no kodomo-tachi
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Gohan, Kuririn, and Buruma try to occupy themselves on their ship until they are attacked by a squadron of smaller ships. They escape, but they are captured by a command ship that is camouflaged to look like the rest of space,...
